title: HealthRBRateOffset Statement
description:
Sets the offset for the consumption rate of the specified parts and joints.

HealthRBRateOffset Statement Example

The example below adds 10% to the consumption rate of the Joint #1 reduction gear unit on the robot 1.

> HealthRBRateOffset 1,HEALTH_ROBOT_TYPE_GEAR,1,10

>

See Also: HealthRBRateOffset Statement

HealthRBAlarmOn

HealthRateRBInfo

HealthRBInfo
see_also: Sets the offset for the consumption rate of the specified parts.
